commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
This PR changes gateway session row projection and child-session candidate indexing, and refactors UI chat tests to avoid inline macrotask Promise executors.

PR surface: Source -2, Tests +6. Total +4 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection and the generated merge tree show the PR's entry-only lightweight branch would combine with current-main tests that still expect model-derived `contextTokens`. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve the current `contextTokens` fallback while keeping the null-store guard and UI lint helper.

target.title: fix(ci): repair current main checks
target.body:
## Summary
- stop lightweight gateway session rows from synthesizing model-derived `contextTokens`, matching the list response contract covered by `server.sessions.list-changed`
- tolerate absent session stores in the narrow `chat.history` session-info path instead of throwing while building child-session candidates
- replace inline macrotask waits in the UI chat test with a helper so the stricter lint rule no longer flags Promise executors

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/gateway/server.sessions.list-changed.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.directive-tags.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts src/gateway/session-utils.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxlint --deny no-promise-executor-return --deny no-redundant-type-constituents --format=unix ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/workboard-3d-game.ts src/gateway/session-utils.ts`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
- AWS Crabbox after rebasing onto current `origin/main` (`290b19275be6c3446506eeee9c15ab9495ac1622`): `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --label ci-blockers-check-changed-current-main --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"` (`provider=aws`, `lease=cbx_942c1ef4d217`, `run=run_b1d33e00ceb4`, exit 0)

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: current-main CI failures in gateway session listing, gateway chat directive-tags, and UI chat lint.
Real environment tested: local linked OpenClaw worktree for focused Vitest/formatter/linter checks, plus remote AWS Crabbox for `pnpm check:changed` on current `origin/main`.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: see Verification above.
Evidence after fix: targeted gateway tests passed 2 files / 116 tests; targeted UI chat test passed 1 file / 68 tests; formatter, lint, whitespace checks, and remote `pnpm check:changed` passed.
Observed result after fix: the failing assertions and lint rules no longer reproduce on the touched surfaces, and the changed gate passes on AWS Crabbox.
What was not tested: full GitHub CI is still running after the rebase push.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
